content_body: We loved our stay here in the Aska Adventure Outpost Cabin. As a mother of a 6 month old, I was never about what we'd be able to do here. I was pleased with how kid friendly the cabin was and happy that we were still able to take advantage of all there is to do here. We loved tubing down the river so much that we did it twice. We also did a lot of hiking, and I highly recommend Long Creek Falls and Fall Branch Falls. A word to the wise...pay attention to which trail you should be on. You don't want to hike 5 extra miles like we did! Another highlight of our week here was spotting 2 deer just outside the cabin. They only made one visit, though we tried to lure them back with apples and corn. All-in-all a great vacation! We have wonderful pictures that I look forward to showing my son when he is older. It was a great 1st vacation for him - turns out he's a born adventurer. Happy stays to all who follow...
title: Family Fun Vacation in Blue Ridge
